commands: Revise the assumption regarding weight sorting; instead of sorting lighter packages first, ensure that high-priority packages are always dispatched first regardless of weight.
Incorporate a clear definition of how priority affects sorting, ensuring that high-priority packages are processed before all others, regardless of their weight or dimensions.
Consider adding a mechanism to dynamically adjust the weights of the sorting criteria based on real-time data or historical performance metrics to further optimize the sorting process.
Include a detailed explanation of how the sorting algorithm will handle ties in priority, weight, and dimensions to avoid any potential delays in dispatching packages.
